sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section III, List of Answers on Terminology 83:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section III, List of Answers on Terminology 83:1
items.html: The ten Sefirot one below the other that come through the ascent of Malchut to the Emanator are called Partzufim [pl. of Partzuf]. (see Inner Observation, Chapter 13, item 1). (Part 3, Chapter 8, item 6)
